description: Spacious & fully renovated 3Bdrm | 3Bath townhouse with 1818 sqft spread over only two levels. Inside you'll find stone countertops, a gas fireplace, a vaulted living room ceiling, skylights for ample natural light & a free standing soaker tub in the master bathroom to relax - something to see & experience in every space of the house. Benefit from the convenience of an attached garage & additional parking. Outside you'll enjoy two patios complemented by a grass area at the back. Ideally located next to schools, trails, Parkgate Village, golf courses & Mt. Seymour. What a place to call home! OPEN HOUSE CANCELED
